# Mainnet Operations Runbook

1. Open the public site and read the Evidence Docket.
2. Use the read-only operator chamber to prepare intent.
3. Open the Expert Mainnet Console only when ready to operate.
4. Accept terms, connect wallet manually, switch to Ethereum Mainnet manually.
5. Run live factual verification.
6. Approve only the exact AGIALPHA amount needed.
7. Run eth_call preflight and gas estimation before every write.
8. Type the required confirmation phrase.
9. Confirm or reject the wallet transaction.
10. Record the tx hash and update evidence.

No GitHub Action, website script, or repo file can authorize funds without a human wallet signature.
